title: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='20' y='20' width='360' height='260' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <rect x='30' y='30' width='340' height='240' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='160' y='50' text-anchor='middle' font-size='24' fill='#FFFFFF'>Media Dashboard</text>
  <g transform='translate(50, 100)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#FFFFFF' rx='5'/>
    <text x='40' y='15' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' fill='#111111'>Filter by Category</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(50, 140)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' fill='#FFFFFF' rx='5'/>
    <text x='50' y='15' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' fill='#111111'>Filter by Tag</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(50, 180)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='120' height='20' fill='#FFFFFF' rx='5'/>
    <text x='60' y='15' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' fill='#111111'>Sort by Title</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(50, 220)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='100' height='20' fill='#FFFFFF' rx='5'/>
    <text x='50' y='15' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' fill='#111111'>Sort by Date Published</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(100, 100)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#FFFFFF' rx='5'/>
    <text x='40' y='15' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' fill='#111111'>Ratings</text>
  </g>
  <g transform='translate(200, 100)'>
    <rect x='0' y='0' width='80' height='20' fill='#FFFFFF' rx='5'/>
    <text x='40' y='15' text-anchor='middle' font-size='16' fill='#111111'>Add New Media</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must be fully interactive with state updates
Must include filter and sort functionality
Must include form for adding new media items with validation

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Dynamic Media Content Management with Advanced Filtering and Sorting

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, filter and sort functionality, and form submission with validation.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
